member_revocation_claim_consistent.name: member_revocation_claim_consistent
member_revocation_claim_consistent.value:
("workspace_control"."member"."revocation_claimed_at" IS NULL AND "workspace_control"."member"."revocation_claim_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("workspace_control"."member"."revocation_claimed_at" IS NOT NULL
          AND "workspace_control"."member"."revocation_claim_id" IS NOT NULL
          AND "workspace_control"."member"."revocation_pending_at" IS NOT NULL)

workspace_connection_revocation_claim_co.name: workspace_connection_revocation_claim_consistent
workspace_connection_revocation_claim_co.value:
("workspace_control"."workspace_connection"."revocation_claimed_at" IS NULL AND "workspace_control"."workspace_connection"."revocation_claim_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("workspace_control"."workspace_connection"."revocation_claimed_at" IS NOT NULL
          AND "workspace_control"."workspace_connection"."revocation_claim_id" IS NOT NULL
          AND "workspace_control"."workspace_connection"."revocation_pending_at" IS NOT NULL)

credential_lease_live_slot_required.name: credential_lease_live_slot_required
credential_lease_live_slot_required.value: "workspace_control"."workspace_credential_lease"."revoked_at" IS NOT NULL OR "workspace_control"."workspace_credential_lease"."active_slot" IS NOT NULL

provider_integration_revocation_claim_co.name: provider_integration_revocation_claim_consistent
provider_integration_revocation_claim_co.value:
("workspace_control"."workspace_provider_integration"."revocation_claimed_at" IS NULL AND "workspace_control"."workspace_provider_integration"."revocation_claim_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("workspace_control"."workspace_provider_integration"."revocation_claimed_at" IS NOT NULL
          AND "workspace_control"."workspace_provider_integration"."revocation_claim_id" IS NOT NULL
          AND "workspace_control"."workspace_provider_integration"."revocation_pending_at" IS NOT NULL)
